evidence_boundary: Reviewed source anchors only; no upstream import, Git access, or runtime source discovery.
Fixture identity string only for the Phase 63 checked-in fixture.
Observed seam transition facts from the checked-in summary only; no wall-seam algorithm equivalence, seam visibility, or byte-for-byte G-code parity.
Observed layer context facts from the checked-in summary only; no planner, geometry, printability, or printer-runtime behavior claim.
Observed travel context facts from the checked-in summary only; no path-planning equivalence, GUI behavior, or printer-runtime behavior claim.
Bounded coordinate observations only; no wall-seam geometry equivalence, tolerance, or printability claim.
Summary extrusion observations only; no material-use, runtime, or printability claim.
Summary retraction observations only; no firmware, printer-runtime, or printability claim.
Checked-in wall-seam fixture summary evidence only; no executable public status claim before Phase 65.
